title: Login page white screen
description: Customer A reports: Chrome browser login page shows white screen, persists after clearing cache.

title: Report export timeout
description: Customer B reports: System times out when exporting reports with more than 10,000 rows.

title: Data import format not supported
description: Customer C requests support for Excel 2007 format (.xls) import; currently only .xlsx is supported.

title: API authentication failure
description: Customer D's API calls frequently return 401 errors; token confirmed not expired.

title: Mobile responsiveness issue
description: Customer E reports: Charts display incompletely on iPad, some buttons unclickable.
